steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: No dependencies declared; verificator confirms empty dependency list is valid.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (assets, corrections, research, plan, intervention, results, code, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: infrastructure-setup task type does not include research-papers.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Survey Windows install gotchas for NEURON 8.2.7 + NetPyNE 1.1.1 and nrnivmodl C-compiler requirements.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior task code and run_with_logs utility conventions relevant to shelling out uv pip and nrnivmodl.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Document install, compile, sanity-simulation, and answer-asset production plan with cost and risk analysis.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: install runs locally, no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Install NEURON 8.2.7 + NetPyNE 1.1.1, compile HH MOD files, run sanity simulations, produce neuron-netpyne-install-report answer asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: infrastructure-setup task type does not include creative-thinking.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: infrastructure-setup task does not produce comparable quantitative results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Formulate follow-up task suggestions derived from the install outcome.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture task sessions, flip task.json status to completed.
